rationale: Review 2's decisive finding about a missing `HopfAlgebra.antipodeAlgHom` is fabricated — the diff's module docstring lists no such deliverable anywhere — so acting on it wastes effort on out-of-scope work; its `@[simp]`-on-`mapValue_comp` finding is debatable (composition simp lemmas are routinely omitted in Mathlib). Review 1 correctly identifies the single real issue (make `antipode_convMul_id` private) without inventing problems.
